ddls:
CREATE TABLE "call_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call duration */,
  "time_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the call (e.g., 1 Hour, 2 Hours) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the call duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the duration for which the price applies */,
  "in_call_price_inr" TEXT /* Price for incoming calls in Indian Rupees */,
  "out_call_price_inr" TEXT /* Price for outgoing calls in Indian Rupees */,
  "in_call_price_usd" TEXT /* Price for incoming calls in US Dollars */,
  "out_call_price_usd" TEXT /* Price for outgoing calls in US Dollars */,
  "pricing_plan" TEXT /* Type of pricing plan (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the pricing plan becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the pricing plan expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_duration_id FOREIGN KEY ("duration_id") REFERENCES call_durations ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer for whom the bill is generated */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the bill */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bill (e.g., INR, USD) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_records" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the call */,
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the duration of the call */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., in-call, out-call) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the call in hours */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price charged for the call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date the call was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_records_duration_id FOREIGN KEY ("duration_id") REFERENCES call_durations ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view bill, update pricing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., INR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., ₹, $) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency rate entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate of the currency against INR */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the conversion rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_addresses" (
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the billing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the billing address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
